jcr:content.jcr:description: AbbVie is committed to equity, equality, diversity and inclusion (EEDI). This includes valuing diverse perspectives, creating an inclusive culture and treating all employees with dignity and respect.
jcr:content.jcr:title: Equity, Equality, Diversity & Inclusion

item_1.name: Text Container Text
item_1.text: Inclusion at AbbVie is the determination we each make to make a difference – for all.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
Everything we all do at AbbVie is grounded in our Principles. These commitments have helped our company make a remarkable impact since our founding in 2013 – transforming lives, acting with integrity, driving innovation, serving the community and embracing diversity & inclusion.

Inclusion shapes the way we lead. It connects us to possibilities we wouldn’t otherwise see. And, it unlocks a level of performance and growth we couldn’t otherwise achieve.

We are proud to offer an environment that allows our colleagues around the world to achieve their full potential. When everyone can be themselves at work and when they’re treated with respect and dignity, we maximize every employee’s potential. By unlocking the exponential potential found in each person, we strengthen the entire business.

block_2.name: Quote
block_2.quotation: With inclusion, we harness the power of all– for the more than 60 million patients we serve, and millions more in the years to come. Together, we build a future worthy of our highest aspirations and our patients’ deepest, most urgent needs.

teaser.description: We’re committed to advancing inclusion so we can innovate and create better outcomes for our patients around the world. We are accountable to one another, because we know that belonging means having a voice and bringing our best. This is the way we do business, attract and develop talent and serve our community.
teaser.name: Teaser
teaser.title: At AbbVie, we lead with inclusion

linklist_item.linkText: Learn about how we make an impact through inclusion
linklist_item.name: LinkList Item

linklist_item_768914564.linkText: View our statement of unity and anti-hate
linklist_item_768914564.name: LinkList Item

custom_title.name: Custom Title
custom_title.title: Why equity, equality, diversity and inclusion matters

custom_image.imageAlt: two women in lab with rainbow coat
custom_image.name: Custom Image

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Inclusion connects us to possibilities we wouldn’t otherwise see. To develop and deliver innovative, life-changing medicines and solutions for the people we serve around the world, we need the creativity that comes with a wide range of perspectives working toward a shared purpose.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: Inclusion unlocks a level of performance and growth we couldn’t otherwise achieve, so we can continue to make possibilities real for our current and future patients and consumers around the world.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text: When everyone can be themselves at work and when they’re treated with respect and dignity, we maximize every employee’s potential. By unlocking the exponential potential found in each person, we strengthen the entire business – that is the power of all.

text_container_text.name: Text Container Text
text_container_text.text:
• Human Rights Campaign Corporate Equality Index
  • Great Place to Work “World’s Best Workplaces”    
  • Seramount "100 Best Companies"    
  • Disability: IN Disability Equality Index  
  • Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For
